name: Omar Pitras Waqar
description: '''Omar Pitras Waqar''' (born December 8, 1980) is an American musician and songwriter based in Washington, D.C. Active since 2000, he blends punk-rock instrumentation with South Asian musical and devotional influences. [[Ethnomusicological]] analysis has identified elements of [[ghazal]] and [[qawwali]] in his work. He founded the bands Diacritical and Sarmust. He also performed experimental electronic music under the name EvilArtForm. Mainstream press and academic studies link him to the Muslim punk movement known as Taqwacore. His perspectives have been characterized as ''anarcho-Sufi''.
